description: AMM commands — create, deposit, withdraw, bid, vote, delete, clawback, and query AMM pools on XRPL

userStories.title: amm create + amm info commands
userStories.description: As a liquidity provider, I want to create an AMM pool from the CLI and query its state.
acceptanceCriteria: Read AMMCreate docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ammcreate.md before implementing
Create src/commands/amm.ts and register in src/commands/index.ts and src/index.ts

xrpl amm create --asset <spec> --asset2 <spec> --amount <value> --amount2 <value> --trading-fee <n>: asset spec is XRP or CURRENCY/issuer; amounts are plain numbers (XRP in drops, IOU in decimal); trading-fee 0-1000
After success print: AMM Account: <address> and LP Token: <currency>
xrpl amm info --asset <spec> --asset2 <spec>: calls amm_info RPC; prints AMM account, pool balances, LP token supply, trading fee; --json for raw output; --node supported
Standard key material (--seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password) and output options (--node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait) on amm create
CLI exits with error if --trading-fee is outside 0-1000
CLI exits with error if both asset specs are identical
tests/e2e/amm/amm.validation.test.ts: no network, no beforeAll; invalid trading fee exits 1; same asset for both slots exits 1

tests/e2e/amm/amm.create-info.test.ts: CRITICAL — use single shared client from beforeAll for ALL xrpl.js calls inside tests — NEVER create new Client() inside a test body; NO polling loops (no while loops, no waitFor helpers); NO retry logic; NO custom LLS; beforeAll timeout 120_000; initTicketPool(client, master, 12); each it.concurrent calls createFunded(client, master, 2, 5) for [issuer, lp]; setupPool(issuer, lp) calls client.submitAndWait for TrustSet then Payment (using shared client); then CLI amm create with --amount 100000 --amount2 10; tests: create XRP/IOU pool verifies output contains AMM Account, --json, --dry-run, amm info shows balances, --no-wait; per-test timeout 120_000; budget: 12x0.2 + 10x5 = 52 <= 99
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CRITICAL TEST RULE: single shared client — never new Client() inside test body. No polling loops. No retry loops. No custom LLS. Use client.submitAndWait() directly. Each test has a unique issuer wallet = unique AMM pool = safe for it.concurrent.

userStories.title: amm deposit + amm withdraw commands
userStories.description: As a liquidity provider, I want to deposit assets into and withdraw from an AMM pool.
acceptanceCriteria: Read AMMDeposit docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ammdeposit.md before implementing
Read AMMWithdraw docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ammwithdraw.md before implementing

xrpl amm deposit --asset --asset2 --amount [--amount2] [--lp-token-out] [--ePrice] [--for-empty]: mode inferred from flag combo (tfTwoAsset, tfSingleAsset, tfLPToken, tfOneAssetLPToken, tfLimitLPToken, tfTwoAssetIfEmpty); LP token amounts auto-fetched via amm_info when --lp-token-out given

xrpl amm withdraw --asset --asset2 [--lp-token-in] [--amount] [--amount2] [--all]: mode inferred from flags (tfLPToken, tfWithdrawAll, tfOneAssetWithdrawAll, tfSingleAsset, tfTwoAsset, tfLimitLPToken)
CLI exits with error if flag combination does not match any valid mode
Standard key material and output options on both commands

tests/e2e/amm/amm.deposit-withdraw.test.ts: single shared client; NO new Client() in tests; NO polling; NO retry; initTicketPool(client, master, 16); each it.concurrent calls createFunded(client, master, 2, 5) for [issuer, lp]; setupPool(issuer, lp) via shared client; CLI amm create to create pool; deposit tests call CLI amm deposit; withdraw tests first deposit via xrpl.js AMMDeposit submitAndWait (setup, shared client) then CLI amm withdraw; tests: double-asset deposit, single-asset deposit, LP-token withdraw, single-asset withdraw, --json, --dry-run; per-test timeout 120_000; budget: 16x0.2 + 12x5 = 62.4 <= 99
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Deposit and withdraw share one test file. For withdraw tests, the xrpl.js AMMDeposit setup call uses the shared client. Never spawn a separate WebSocket connection.

userStories.title: amm bid + amm vote commands
userStories.description: As an LP token holder, I want to bid on the auction slot and vote on the trading fee.
acceptanceCriteria: Read AMMBid docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ammbid.md before implementing
Read AMMVote docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ammvote.md before implementing
xrpl amm bid --asset --asset2 [--bid-min <n>] [--bid-max <n>] [--auth-account <addr>] (repeatable, max 4): LP token amounts auto-fetched via amm_info
xrpl amm vote --asset --asset2 --trading-fee <n> (0-1000)
CLI exits with error if more than 4 --auth-account values given
CLI exits with error if --trading-fee out of 0-1000 range
Standard key material and output options on both

tests/e2e/amm/amm.bid-vote.test.ts: single shared client; NO new Client() in tests; NO polling; NO retry; initTicketPool(client, master, 12); each it.concurrent calls createFunded(client, master, 2, 5) for [issuer, lp]; setupPool then CLI amm create (lp now holds LP tokens received at creation); bid tests: CLI amm bid; vote tests: CLI amm vote then verify new fee via amm info; tests: bid on slot, vote on fee + verify, --json, --dry-run; per-test timeout 120_000; budget: 12x0.2 + 10x5 = 52 <= 99
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: LP tokens are automatically received by the pool creator at AMMCreate time. No extra deposit step needed before bid/vote.

userStories.title: amm delete + amm clawback commands
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to delete empty AMM pools and claw back IOU assets from pools.
acceptanceCriteria: Read AMMDelete docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ammdelete.md before implementing
Read AMMClawback docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ammclawback.md before implementing
xrpl amm delete --asset --asset2: standard key material and output options
xrpl amm clawback --asset --asset2 --holder <address> [--amount <value>] [--both-assets]
Standard key material and output options on both

tests/e2e/amm/amm.delete.test.ts: single shared client; NO new Client() in tests; NO polling; NO retry; initTicketPool(client, master, 10); each it.concurrent calls createFunded(client, master, 2, 5) for [issuer, lp]; setupPool then CLI amm create; withdraw all LP tokens via xrpl.js AMMWithdraw submitAndWait (setup, shared client); then CLI amm delete; tests: delete after withdraw-all, --json, --dry-run; per-test timeout 120_000; budget: 10x0.2 + 8x5 = 42 <= 99
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: amm clawback requires issuer to have AllowTrustLineClawback set before trust lines are created — complex setup. Skip amm clawback network test; validation test is sufficient. AMMDelete only works when pool is empty (all LP tokens returned).
